title: celtis caucasica var. tupalangi
intro: Celtis caucasica var. tupalangi, also known as the Tupalangi Hackberry or Caucasian Hackberry, is a plant species from the Celtis genus, native to the mountainous regions of the Caucasus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Celtis caucasica var. tupalangi include the potential treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Celtis caucasica var. tupalangi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are commonly used in folk medicine to harness its health benefits.
